title: Evaluate Microsoft Agent Framework
description: Follow-up to Evaluate Microsoft AutoGen. Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) is the production successor to AutoGen (which entered maintenance mode in 2026). AutoGen is the lineage; MAF is the new foundation. This issue evaluates MAF against the EDASES layered architecture and updates capability-mapping/Harness-Capability-Matrix.md with a MAF column. Scope: same template as the AutoGen evaluation (harness-evaluations/_template.md). Strategic rationale: any EDASES adoption of AutoGen is investment in a sunsetting framework; MAF evaluation is required before any architectural commitment. Apply Heuristic Scouting methodology (methodology-reviews/Heuristic-Scouting.md). Sources: microsoft/agent-framework GitHub, learn.microsoft.com migration guide, MS Research pages.
